methodologySummary: Quarterly market analysis reviewing prior quarter material calls against actual market outcomes, then issuing forward-looking market intelligence for the next quarter.

humanReviewProcess.stage1_evidence_collection: Evidence watchlist sourced and verified against primary data
humanReviewProcess.stage2_thesis_validation: Working thesis tested against evidence; materially contradicted theses rejected
humanReviewProcess.stage3_scenario_calibration: Forward-looking scenarios calibrated against evidence base, not speculation
humanReviewProcess.stage4_falsification_register: Claims tested for falsifiability; non-falsifiable claims rejected
humanReviewProcess.stage5_boundary_compliance: Language audit ensures no investment advice, no price prediction certainty
humanReviewProcess.stage6_authority_gate: All 7 authority gates must pass before commercial release

evidenceBoundary: This is evidence-limited quarterly market intelligence. It is not investment advice, financial advice, or a prediction guarantee. It is designed to structure market judgement and maintain verification discipline through quarterly call review.
customerAcknowledgement: Customer must acknowledge evidence boundary before delivery

qualityTests.generic_ai_test: Not interchangeable with generic market summarization
qualityTests.no_mock_authority: No mock validation, all evidence real
qualityTests.adversarial_validation: Can withstand challenge on evidence basis

complianceChecks.prior_quarter_review: Verified — Q1 2026 calls reviewed against outcomes
